questionHtml: Show that the initial quantity of potassium-40 in the rock sample was about 450 µmol.
markschemeHtml:
total K-40 decayed = 12 μmol0.11=109 «μmol» ✓

so total K-40 originally was 109 + 340 = 449 «μmol»✓

meta.title: Show that the initial quantity of potassium-40 in the rock sample was about 450 µmol.
